description: Hive explains the meaning of the Kree artifact to Daisy as the Kree Reapers arrive in the town, summoned via the beacon. The Reapers begin to hunt, targeting Inhumans and Hydra agents alike. Hive and Daisy realize the gravity of the threat and plan to obtain Kree blood for Radcliffe's experiment. The danger escalates dramatically for all involved.

transcript.line: Who's coming? S.H.I.E.L.D.?
Not the ones who made you, the ones who made me.
Move! Go, go, go!
What the hell was that?
The Kree.
The Kree are here? How did they even find us?
I sent them a signal.
The artifacts from James' trailer.
Are a failsafe to be used if the Inhuman experiment ever got out of control.
In case of emergency, call Kree headquarters.
These Kree are not from their home world. They're Reapers. They exist only to hunt.
And to find humans for your makers.
For thousands of years, they've remained in stasis, orbiting our solar system.
So they're coming here to do what? Clean up their mess? These are the only things that can defeat you. Those are your exact words.
The Reapers are my greatest fear, but with your help, I believe we will rip out their hearts. Those words are yours.
That's really not what I meant. I fought a Kree before. They won't be easy to kill.
These Reapers are even deadlier, which will make your task more difficult.
My task?
For this experiment to work, we need blood from a living Kree. And I want you to get it.
Was that a spaceship?
It's too small, looks like more of a satellite.
Why am I not relieved? You find anything?
There's debris everywhere and some really big footprints.
Like alien footprints, right? That's what we're talking about here?
Great. Now we have more players to contend with.
The frickin' aliens just landed. We're not... We're not gonna take a moment and let that soak in?
Well, the question is, whose side are they on?
Run! Go!
Inhuman.
Actually, that's Inhumans, plural.
No! You should be proud of what we've become.
He's taking out HYDRA agents.
Or everything he comes across.
This will be a lot easier if that guy's on our side.
Why would Hive signal these things?
Maybe he's hoping to form some sort of creepy dude alliance.
These things are hunters, not allies. Coulson, what are our orders?
Follow at a close distance, but stay out of that thing's cross hairs.
It senses something in that church.
Yeah, my money's on Hive. Daisy.
Those aren't our orders. Mack.
I got to try. I'll meet you at the extraction point.
